name: Regime-triggered structural carry — pre-registered activation rule (PROJECT_REVIEW section 5C verbatim)
role: the centerpiece: only construction whose in-regime Sharpe history (>=2) clears the power wall within ~1-2 years of triggered time; dormant at zero cost until the regime arrives

trigger_on.funding: equal-weight 8-major Binance perp funding > 8%/yr sustained 30 consecutive days

book_while_on.senior_sleeve: long spot + short dated quarterly, BTC + ETH, hold-to-convergence
book_while_on.junior_sleeve: short perp funding receiver on the 8 majors, equal-weight

crash_tail_control: pre-declared: perp-spot carry KILL showed short-crash-option profile (skew -12.9, Nov-2024 -18.9% month); hence the 50% perp-leg cap with contractually-converging dated-basis as senior sleeve; tail stress is part of the published spec

scoring.claim: triggered windows beat T-bills net of everything, at honest N=1
scoring.windows: scored ONLY over ON-windows, cumulative across regimes

nulls.primary: calendar-reanchor + regime-placebo (random alternative trigger dates with matched ON-duration)
nulls.documented_wrong_null: XS-shuffle — wrong for directional carry; no cross-sectional selection claim to destroy

scoring.looks: quarterly under the Campaign E alpha-spending schedule (PREREGISTRATION.md section 5)

power: in-regime carry at 2021/2024 richness paid double-digit APR delta-neutral (dated-basis low-funding-regime Sharpe 2.87; 2024 funding blowout 10.99%/yr) -> in-regime true Sharpe >= 2 -> ~1-2 years cumulative ON-time to 80% power; if the regime never returns the hypothesis stays dormant at zero cost
data: $0: cached funding/basis series + daily recorder (output/recorders/market-funding.ndjson, market-basis.ndjson); T-bill benchmark from cached FRED series
source: docs/PROJECT_REVIEW_2026-06-09.md section 5C (normative, copied verbatim in substance)
scripts/edgehunt/dated_futures_carry.ts (dated-basis entry/roll/convergence mechanics reused by the senior sleeve)
